header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker at around 50. While I wouldn't completely ignore the coworker's action, I also wouldn't create a big scene. I would likely approach them privately, explain that I noticed they took credit for my idea, and ask them to correct the record. I value maintaining a positive work environment and don't want to cause unnecessary tension, but I also want to ensure my contributions are recognized.
